post_deploy_cmd: (n/a; deploy/post-receive runs `docker compose up -d --build cw_api cw_frontend` AND rsync landing -> /var/www/cw-landing/)
notes: Mode: git-push-to-deploy. Push to the remote `vps204` (NOT origin) triggers the server-side post-receive hook that lives at deploy/post-receive in this repo. The hook performs the checkout + docker compose rebuild + landing rsync. Receipt is the synchronous push output (the hook prints docker compose tail to stderr, which Git surfaces to the pushing developer). Healthcheck currently uses kind=http on the canonical landing URL; if the Owner provides a JSON /api/health endpoint, switch to kind=curl-grep with a known body fragment for stronger §77-style content verification.
